title: Company-Wide Town Hall Meeting
description: Please join us for our monthly company-wide town hall meeting. We will discuss Q2 updates, upcoming projects, and welcome new team members. Q&A session will follow.

title: Frontend Design System Review
description: The Frontend Team will meet on Friday at 2:00 PM to review the new design system. Please ensure all assigned tasks are updated beforehand.

title: Sprint Retrospective: Platform Redesign
description: Sprint retro for the Platform Redesign project. We will review our velocity, identify bottlenecks, and plan improvements for the next iteration.
